_source: LLM_KNOWLEDGE + pstchip.dat pin names (DCURX MAIN version) | CRITICAL: NO PDF — needs datasheet urgently
_confidence: LOW — pin names from pstchip.dat are authoritative, but electrical params are inferred from LM5060 compatibility claim
_critical_note: Pin 3/4 mapping differs from LM5060! JW7221: pin3=UVLO/EN, pin4=OVLO. LM5060: pin3=OVP, pin4=UVLO. Confirmed by two different pstchip.dat versions (DCURX MAIN vs A39 BRG).
description: High-Side Protection Controller (LM5060 compatible with pin differences)

1.name: SENSE
1.description: High-side current sense input. Connect to input supply side.

3.name: UVLO/EN
3.description: Undervoltage lockout / Enable. NOT OVP! (differs from LM5060 pin3=OVP)

4.name: OVLO
4.description: Overvoltage lockout. NOT UVLO! (differs from LM5060 pin4=UVLO)

6.name: TIMER
6.description: Fault timer capacitor pin. (LM5060 pin6=GND, pin7=TIMER)

9.name: OUT
9.description: Output voltage sense. Connect to load side of MOSFET.

10.name: GATE
10.description: Gate drive output for external N-channel MOSFET.

electrical_parameters._note: Parameters below are INFERRED from LM5060 compatibility. JW7221 datasheet needed for verification.

drc_hints.pin_mapping_warning: Pin 3/4/5/6/7 differ from LM5060. Do NOT use LM5060 pinout for JW7221.
